headline: Wise Group shares are trading lower amid volatility following its Nasdaq listing.
summary: Wise Group shares are trading lower amid volatility following its Nasdaq listing.

headline: Apollo's Zelter Expects High-Grade Debt Sales to Top US Treasuries
summary: Jim Zelter, president at Apollo Global Management, says the "phenomenal and unprecedented" AI capex boom could cause issues for smaller companies looking to tap the public markets and says investment-grade debt sales will outpace net issuance of US Treasuries this year.

raw.headline: Apollo's Zelter Expects High-Grade Debt Sales to Top US Treasuries
raw.summary: Jim Zelter, president at Apollo Global Management, says the "phenomenal and unprecedented" AI capex boom could cause issues for smaller companies looking to tap the public markets and says investment-grade debt sales will outpace net issuance of US Treasuries this year.

headline: Alternative Managers Shares Slip as Cliffwater Redemption Fears Mount
summary: KKR, APO, BX, OWL and BLK slide after Cliffwater's Corporate Lending Fund faces Q2 redemption requests equal to 17% of shares, exposing liquidity strains.

raw.headline: Alternative Managers Shares Slip as Cliffwater Redemption Fears Mount
raw.summary: KKR, APO, BX, OWL and BLK slide after Cliffwater's Corporate Lending Fund faces Q2 redemption requests equal to 17% of shares, exposing liquidity strains.

headline: Broadcom Says AI Demand Is 'Insatiable'
summary: Broadcom's AI revenue surges 143% to $10.8B in Q2. The chipmaker projects AI revenue to exceed $100B by 2027.

raw.headline: Broadcom Says AI Demand Is 'Insatiable'
raw.summary: Broadcom's AI revenue surges 143% to $10.8B in Q2. The chipmaker projects AI revenue to exceed $100B by 2027.

headline: Elizabeth Warren Warns AI Could Disrupt 'Half The Workforce,' Says 'Can't Wait Until People Lose Their Jobs'
summary: Elizabeth Warren warns AI could disrupt half the workforce, urging a tax on data centers and calling for tech companies to help offset job losses.

raw.headline: Elizabeth Warren Warns AI Could Disrupt 'Half The Workforce,' Says 'Can't Wait Until People Lose Their Jobs'
raw.summary: Elizabeth Warren warns AI could disrupt half the workforce, urging a tax on data centers and calling for tech companies to help offset job losses.

headline: Anthropic And OpenAI Are So Desperate For Compute They Let Broadcom Finance Their Own Chips For Them
summary: Broadcom CEO Hock Tan said the company is helping finance AI chips for Anthropic, OpenAI and other compute-hungry developers.

raw.headline: Anthropic And OpenAI Are So Desperate For Compute They Let Broadcom Finance Their Own Chips For Them
